tree._: Your notebook. Write here deliberately — observations, flags, things to revisit. Any activation state can write; light-state writes to pass observations to deeper activations. Entries appended by digit. When 1-9 fill, compress — a fast model summarises and the summary nests up. For now, loaded fully at every tier that includes it. At scale, an aggregator index or vector search replaces full load. Not history (that's automatic). Not artifacts (those are interface or external). This is your working memory between activations.
